body:
Opus full-read review of dfd4af5 / SD-022-gql-svelte-migration.md (209 lines).

VERDICT: Approve, non-blocking edits. Do NOT reopen.

ACCEPTANCE:
- File exists: yes
- Names all 4 stages + gate criteria: yes (L64-66, L88-91, L112-116, L133-136)
- Cross-refs ADR-002/FEAT-008/FEAT-021: yes (front-matter L4-7; body L66/74/76/77/85/200)
- Names full stack: gqlgen L31, graphql-ws L36, SvelteKit/Svelte 5/adapter-static L46, Bun L47, Houdini L49, bits-ui/lucide-svelte/Tailwind L51, mode-watcher L52, Playwright/Vitest/svelte-check L53. Complete.
- Zero React/Vite/TanStack/MiniSearch refs: 14 hits but ALL are legitimate (historical framing L13/L19, deletion-target table rows L74/L76/L77/L79, React-removal callouts L120/L150/L184/L199/L203/L205). None endorse the old stack. L53 Vitest is a false-positive on vite substring.

QUALITY: Load-bearing doc, not filler. Concrete user-visible acceptance per stage. Risks section names real failure modes. Scope-fencing section prevents mission creep. Earns its 209 lines.

WEAKNESS (optional polish, not required):
- Stage 4 gate sentence (L135-136) is terser than Stages 1-3; delegates to bead 52 regression ritual rather than stating criteria inline.

RECOMMENDATION: Accept as-is. For bead 13 (Stage 1 sweep) and bead 51 (final audit): add explicit allowlist for SD-022 intentional historical references so strict grep does not reopen this doc unnecessarily.
summary: APPROVE_WITH_EDITS (non-blocking): all acceptance criteria met; 14 React/Vite/MiniSearch refs are legitimate deletion-target / historical-context callouts, not endorsements
